---
title: "Resume"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# Education

<p style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">

University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC<br> Master of Geomatics
for Environmental Management Sept. 2025 - May 2026

</p>

<p style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">

University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC<br> Bachelor of Wood
Products Processing, Minor in Commerce Sept. 2022 - May 2025

</p>

<p style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">

Beijing Forestry University, Beijing, China<br> Bachelor of Wood Science
and Engineering Sept. 2019 - June 2022

</p>

# Publications

*Peer-reviewed publication:*

-   Jin, C., Zhu, S., & Feng, H. (2025). *Life Cycle Assessment of Engineered Wood Products in the Building Sector: A Review.* Buildings, 15(22), 4193. [https://doi.org/10.3390/buildings15224193](https://doi.org/10.3390/buildings15224193)
